name: Brex Business Credit Card
perks: No personal guarantee required for qualifying businesses
No annual fee, no foreign transaction fees, no interest (charge card)
Points transfer to airline partners (Avianca, Air France/KLM, Cathay Pacific, and more)
Integrated expense management with real-time reporting
Up to $150/month in statement credits for qualifying categories
Scales with your business: spending limit based on cash balance
drawbacks: Charge card: balance must be paid in full each month
Requires a Brex business account and qualifying company (VC-backed, US-incorporated)
Not available for sole proprietors or most small businesses without institutional funding
No traditional credit building (charge card, not revolving credit)
Best rewards require using Brex Travel and partner ecosystem
Spending limit tied to cash balance can restrict large purchases
